_comment: Application-bundled mutations shipped inside the mandala binary. Parsed by src/application/document/mutations_loader/builtin.rs at startup. Each entry here uses the legacy { mutations + target_scope } shape, which the backward-compat deserializer in lib/baumhard/src/mindmap/custom_mutation/serialized.rs transparently translates into a MutatorNode. This keeps pure-data entries terse; the fully explicit mutator-AST shape is also accepted (see format/mutations.md).

mutations.name: Grow Font 2pt
mutations.description: Increase font size by 2 points on the selected node and all descendants.

mutations.name: Shrink Font 2pt
mutations.description: Decrease font size by 2 points on the selected node and all descendants.

mutations.name: Nudge Right 50px
mutations.description: Shift the selected node 50 pixels to the right, leaving its descendants in place.
